description: Add specialized database indexes: composite feed index, FTS GIN indexes, partial indexes for content status
steps: Create EF Core migration with all missing indexes from FEXORA-010
Include: idx_content_feed (composite), idx_content_fts (GIN), idx_profiles_fts (GIN), idx_content_approved (partial), idx_content_pending (partial)
Include: idx_trending, idx_messages_mod_attr (partial), idx_notifications_user, idx_blocked_unique, idx_subscriptions_check, idx_comments_content, idx_content_tags_tag
